items.title: Copy of Bellingham's big night eclipses anonymous Haaland ...
items.summary: Jude Bellingham struck twice as England came from behind to beat Norway 2-1 in extra time and reach the World Cup semifinals amid sweltering Florida heat.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
